item.title: Hey imgur, I want to share the ups and downs of my weight loss journey
item.description:
I've posted about my weight loss here years ago, but I thought I'd give an update. Here I was in my 20s. It's one of the only pictures I have of myself back then. I was deeply depressed, in a toxic relationship, and on the fast track to diabetes. When I wasn't working, I was glued to the screens, eating fast food, snacking constantly, and downing 5-7 cans of soda/pop a day. I live in America and with our heathcare system I knew soon I could be deeply in debt with health problems.
In my 30s, I decided to change my life. I got out of my home situation, which led to a change in diet and exercise. I stopped snacking, had no fast food, no pop, and cut my meals in half. I started taking walks in the nearby forest nature trails and discovered it gave my mind the peace I needed, so I fell in love with being surrounded by nature. I lost about 100 lbs in one year. The weight just came off so fast, I never had a goal because I never actually thought I'd be able to lose weight.
Here I am just got in my 40s. I, once again, embraced a change in my life. Got offered a new job and moved states away from everyone I know and love. I had been going to the gym constantly over the past 5 years because I had noticeably started putting weight back on, but I was still gaining weight. My problem was definitely my diet. This picture was from October 2023. I started a high protein, very low to no sugar/carb diet with vegetables every day. It was hard to say no to new co-workers offering food, but I stayed strong.
It took time, but I've lost almost 40 lbs since I started. I look like I'm in the best shape of my life. Back around March, I started having bad cramps every time I needed to go to the bathroom. I thought it could have been my diet. Maybe I have too much protein? Maybe it's just me getting old. It progressively got worse. The pain was too much to ignore. By June, it was time for a colonoscopy. I wasn't expecting the doctor to automatically tell me the bad news. Colon cancer. Only a week later, I was in surgery to remove 10in of my intestines along with the tumor threatening to block up the works. Recovery was the worst experience and most pain I've ever been in. In what was removed, they found cancer had spread to a lymph node. I was stage 3. Chemo highly recommended.
Here I am with my first round of chemo. Every 2 weeks for the next 6 months I have 4hrs of chemo and carry around my little fanny pack of poison for 2 days. I've already experienced previews of the side effects that, from what I've been told, will only get worse as I get into the thick of it. I'm trying to stay very optimistic and positive throughout this whole experience, and Imgur has helped me get through this, so I hope that my story will help even just one person out there. If you don't think you can lose weight, you can! If you don't think you can get through the thing, you can! Personally, I like to say- With a positive attitude and a great set of tits, you can do anything! Thank you for reading all this and get those preventive screenings!!!
item.dc:creator: juniejunicorn

item.title: Cartoon Cosplays from Kamii Momoru
item.description:
Peach, Daisy, and Rosalina try out Spider-Gwen, Spider-Woman, and Silk outfits. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1720517306688655667
Cammy White is going to kick ass in her Barbie outfit! Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1684263462061342723
Pomni is a little nervous in her Classic Harley outfit. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1718339365837947199
Purah helped dress up Wall-E to look like her favorite little adventurer. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1658244458737987585
Daisy looks great in her Zero Suit, right?? Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1522289057333755904
Mordecai and Rigby are ready for adventure! Source: https://x.com/Kamii_momoru/status/1497719723366125568 All art is by Kamii Momoru: https://www.instagram.com/momoru_kamii/ - - - - - I saw that this artist had a lot of characters in cosplay, so I figured I'd share! What's a character swap cosplay you'd like to see??
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.title: Images of Note: Bootloops
item.description:
Fluffy doesn't care. Fluffy can read. Fluffy gonna sit on the cake.
This is an edgy meme, is it referring to itself?
End users: "Can...can we modify it to our preferences?" Linux: "Yes of course!" Windows: "YOU WILL USE THIS LLM AND FUCKIN' LIKE IT!"
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii All hail the trees
oh no
:)
SCART phone
what...what does that sound like?
Waitrose is wrong: Waitrose should look like old-money ultra-posh Dark Academia type. They got M&S right though.
Remember this
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Follow for BLUE PISS
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
What do you mean too weak FromSoft?
The difference is you get to study what's interesting to you, the coolstuff.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Love how I can deez nuts people
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
